跳过导航链接
  • 概览
  • 树
  • 已过时
  • 索引
  • 搜索
  • 帮助

    所有类和接口

    类
    说明
    AbstractInventoryModule
    Modules that follow a general pattern of equipping an item to a hotbar or offhand slot and using it
    AbstractInventoryModule.ActionState
     
    AbstractInventoryModule.HandRestriction
     
    AbstractInventoryModule.InventoryActionResult
     
    AbstractNodeCostSearch
     
    Action
    A task's action to be executed once a Condition is met

    Baritone
    todo: doors, fences, and gates opening interactions interface for dispatching pathing commands with configurations i.e. disallow block breaking for certain goals, allow long distance falling, etc Rethink the baritone "Process" system. is there a better abstraction for multi-step goals?

    CircularFifoQueue<E>
    CircularFifoQueue is a first-in first-out queue with a fixed size that replaces its oldest element if full.
    CKeepAliveHandler
     
    ClearAreaProcess
     
    ClearAreaProcess.Area
     
    Click
     
    ClickCommand
     
    ClickItem
     
    ClickOptions
     
    ClickResult
     
    ClickResult.LeftClickResult
    Left click -> block start destroy (return block position and instance) -> block continue destroy (return block position and instance) -> entity attack (return entity instance) -> swing Right click -> use item on block (return block position and instance) -> use item on entity (return entity instance) -> use item
    ClickResult.LeftClickResult.LeftClickType
     
    ClickResult.None
     
    ClickResult.RightClickResult
     
    ClickResult.RightClickResult.RightClickType
     
    ClickTarget
     
    ClickTarget.Any
     
    ClickTarget.AnyBlock
     
    ClickTarget.AnyEntity
     
    ClickTarget.BlockPosition
     
    ClickTarget.EntityId
     
    ClickTarget.EntityInstance
     
    ClickTarget.EntityTypeTarget
     
    ClickTarget.None
     
    ClientBotTick
     
    ClientBotTick.Starting
     
    ClientBotTick.Stopped
     
    ClientCommandsOutgoingHandler
     
    ClientCommandsSpectatorOutgoingHandler
     
    ClientConfigurationEvent
     
    ClientConfigurationEvent.Entered
    Fired when the client has entered the configuration phase, on having sent the ServerboundConfigurationAcknowledgedPacket
    ClientConfigurationEvent.Entering
    Fired right before the client enters the configuration phase, on receiving the ClientboundStartConfigurationPacket This does *not* get fired on initial login->configuration state switch, only when reconfiguring
    ClientConfigurationEvent.Exited
    Fired when the client has exited the configuration phase, on having sent the ServerboundFinishConfigurationPacket
    ClientConfigurationEvent.Exiting
    Fired right before the client exits the configuration phase, on receiving the ClientboundFinishConfigurationPacket
    ClientConnectEvent
     
    ClientConnectionCommand
     
    ClientDeathEvent
     
    ClientDeathMessageEvent
     
    ClientDisconnectEvent
     
    ClientEventLoopPacketHandler<P,S>

    ClientOnlineEvent

    ForeverContinuation

    GameEventHandler
     
    GameEventSpectatorOutgoingHandler
     
    GetToBlockProcess
     
    Globals
     
    Goal
     
    GoalBlock
     
    GoalComposite
    A composite of many goals, any one of which satisfies the composite.
    GoalGetToBlock
    Don't get into the block, but get directly adjacent to it.
    GoalNear
     
    GoalRunAway
    Useful for automated combat (retreating specifically)
    GoalStrictDirection
    Dig a tunnel in a certain direction, but if you have to deviate from the path, go back to where you started
    GoalTwoBlocks
    Useful if the goal is just to mine a block.
    GoalXZ
     
    GoalY

    A Condition that is met after a specific Duration has passed since the last time it was met.

    Interface for an inventory action submitted through the InventoryManager Each action is associated with an expected container id.

    Warning: unstable interface May change in future MC versions
    Player
     
    PlayerAbilitiesHandler
     
    PlayerAbilitiesSpectatorOutgoingHandler
     
    PlayerCache
     
    PlayerCache.KeepAliveRequest
     
    PlayerCache.PingRequest
     
    PlayerChatHandler
     
    PlayerCombatKillHandler
     
    PlayerCommandSource
     
    PlayerCommandSpectatorHandler
     
    PlayerConfigurationEvent
     
    PlayerConfigurationEvent.Entered
    Fired when the player has entered the initial login -> configuration phase, on zenith having received the ServerboundLoginAcknowledgedPacket
    PlayerConfigurationEvent.Exited
    Fired when the player has exited the configuration phase, on zenith receiving the ServerboundFinishConfigurationPacket
    PlayerConfigurationEvent.Exiting
    Fired right before the client exits the initial configuration phase, right before zenith sends the ClientboundFinishConfigurationPacket
    PlayerConnectedEvent

    Requeue
    On 2b2t, if we stop responding to KeepAlive packets we will get sent back to queue not to the end of the queue, but as if we were doing a reconnect queue skip so this can be useful for resetting the player state without having to do a full reconnect
    RequeueCommand
